text.title: Cloud LB Terraform Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the lb-cloud-terraform methodology end-to-end.

step.name: confirm-lb-product
step.action: Apply the decision tree (06-decision-tree.xml). HTTP/HTTPS on AWS → ALB; TCP/UDP on AWS → NLB; global anycast HTTP → GCP Global LB or AWS Global Accelerator. Azure path is out of scope here.

step.name: provision-prereqs
step.input: VPC, subnets, ACM/managed cert ARN, log-bucket.
step.action: Confirm VPC + ≥2 subnets across AZs for HA. Pre-provision ACM cert (AWS) or `google_compute_managed_ssl_certificate` (GCP). Pre-provision S3/GCS bucket with versioning + correct bucket policy.
step.output: Resource IDs ready for the LB module.
step.decision-gate: If the cert is unverified or bucket policy is missing, STOP.

step.name: write-terraform
step.action: Render `templates/alb.tf` or `templates/gcp-global-lb.tf`. Set `enable_deletion_protection = true`, `ssl_policy = "ELBSecurityPolicy-TLS13-1-2-2021-06"`, HTTP listener → 301 redirect, security group restricted to 80+443, target SG sourced from LB SG ID.

step.name: static-scan
step.action: Run `tflint --enable-rule=aws_lb_invalid_load_balancer_type` + `tfsec` + `checkov -d .`. Resolve every HIGH finding. Run `validate-lb-cloud-terraform.py --file artefact.json`.
step.decision-gate: If HIGH findings remain, fix before plan.

step.name: plan-apply-observe
step.action: `terraform plan -out=tfplan` → review diff → `terraform apply tfplan`. Confirm LB DNS resolves; confirm `nmap --script ssl-enum-ciphers` shows only TLS 1.2+. Confirm first access log appears in the bucket within 5 minutes.
